title: European Gas Falls As Warm Weather Eases Concerns Of Shortages
section_path: European Gas Falls As Warm Weather Eases Concerns Of Shortages
section_path_text: European Gas Falls As Warm Weather Eases Concerns Of Shortages
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Sentiment remained weak in commodity markets as concerns over Chinese growth remain elevated. This was offset somewhat by a weaker USD, which helped support investor demand. Crude oil remained heavily influenced by broader market trends and shifts in the USD.
